task_origin: ROI items A1 (weight pre-cache --apply) + A4 (corpus shard --apply) + C14 (persona swap-in R2 stage)

cred_status.rclone_remote_mismatch_note: tool/h100_weight_precache.bash defaults to RCLONE_R2_REMOTE=r2anima. Local rclone has only 'r2:'. To execute apply, either (a) export RCLONE_R2_REMOTE=r2 before running, or (b) add an 'r2anima' remote pointing to the same Cloudflare R2 endpoint.

blocking_reason: HF_TOKEN env var not set; tool/h100_weight_precache.bash --apply will exit 3 at pre-flight 3/3 before any network I/O. A4 corpus shard does NOT need HF_TOKEN, but the safe-stop policy keeps both items deferred together so cred remediation is a single step.

a1_weight_precache_apply.expected_wall_time_min: 120-240 (HF download + R2 mirror, ~125GB end-to-end on residential link; <30 min on gigabit)
side_effects: rclone copy → cloudflare r2 anima-weights bucket (idempotent, --size-only)
rclone copyto → cloudflare r2 anima-corpus bucket (idempotent via lsjson size match)
a4_corpus_shard_apply.cred_requirement: rclone r2: remote ONLY (HF_TOKEN NOT required). Could run independently of A1, but bundled here for single cred-remediation step.

artifacts_inventory.rationale: Qwen2.5-14B base weights are produced by H100 base load step; no local copy exists. Cannot stage to R2 until A1 completes for the relevant path (p3/p4 currently track Ministral/Gemma — Qwen2.5-14B is NOT in current weight precache manifest). Schema requires upstream decision: either add Qwen2.5-14B to weight manifest, OR rewrite serve_alm_persona swap-in to consume one of {p1..p4}.
Persona LoRA (activation-steering vectors at PERSONA_LAYER_IDX=20) is generated from contrast-pair training; no on-disk adapter exists. Must be built before R2 stage.
raw#9 hexa-only — .py body is forbidden in repo and is deployed only via tool/h100_dispatch_kit.bash directly to the H100 pod. Not eligible for R2 stage.
hexa source lives in repo; pod fetches via git/dispatch kit. R2 mirror is not part of swap-in protocol for hexa artifacts.

c14_persona_swap_in_r2_stage.executable_when: After (a) Qwen2.5-14B base weights produced + base_model_path STAGED, AND (b) dest1 persona LoRA trained + persona_lora_path STAGED. Only then can a corresponding R2 stage script be authored.
c14_persona_swap_in_r2_stage.no_op_today: Zero of the 4 swap-in artifacts are eligible for R2 staging today (2 MISSING/not-built, 1 raw#9 prohibited, 1 hexa-already-local). C14 cannot be apply-executed even with HF_TOKEN present.

remediation_to_unblock: 1. Obtain HF_TOKEN with read access to {Qwen/Qwen3-8B, unsloth/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B, mistralai/Ministral-3-14B-Base-2512, google/gemma-4-31B}; export HF_TOKEN=hf_...
2. Either set RCLONE_R2_REMOTE=r2 (since local has only 'r2:' remote) OR add an 'r2anima' rclone remote that mirrors the same R2 endpoint
3. Re-run this dispatcher; A1 + A4 will execute in background, C14 will still be DEFERRED until base weights + persona LoRA are built
raw_compliance: raw#9  hexa-only: no .py created (state json only)
raw#12 실측 only: no fabricated 'apply success' — DEFERRED_NO_CREDS surfaced
raw#15 no-hardcode: all paths/manifests read from existing SSOTs
raw#20 H100 stop-gate: no launch triggered, .roadmap untouched
